summary: Block 2 testing completed: QR Campaign management, Initial Intents, Channel auto-detection. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: QR Campaigns page functional, Lead cards show channel badges, minor UI issue with Intents section expand/collapse.

ui_bugs.issue: Intenciones Iniciales section does not expand when clicking on the CardHeader. The click handler on CardHeader with onClick={() => setShowIntentsSection(!showIntentsSection)} does not trigger state change. Count badge shows '5' intents loaded but content remains collapsed.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/qr-campaigns returns list with leads_count field
Backend: POST /api/qr-campaigns creates new campaign
Backend: PUT /api/qr-campaigns/{id} updates campaign
Backend: DELETE /api/qr-campaigns/{id} deletes campaign
Backend: GET /api/qr-campaigns/{id}/qrcode returns PNG image (public endpoint)
Backend: GET /api/qr-campaigns/{id}/link returns WhatsApp wa.me link with pre-filled text
Backend: GET /api/intents returns list of 5+ default intents
Backend: POST /api/intents creates new intent with keywords array
Backend: PUT /api/intents/{id} updates intent
Backend: DELETE /api/intents/{id} deletes intent
Backend: POST /api/leads with channel field persists correctly
Backend: GET /api/leads?channel= filter works correctly
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} channel field update works
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'QR y Canales' nav link with QrCode icon
Frontend: /qr-campaigns route loads QRCampaignsPage
Frontend: QR Campaigns page header 'Campañas QR y Canales' visible
Frontend: 3 default campaign cards displayed (Evento, Fibeca, TV)
Frontend: Campaign cards show channel badge (emerald), product badge, active status
Frontend: Ver QR button shows QR code preview
Frontend: QR code image loads from /api/qr-campaigns/{id}/qrcode
Frontend: Descargar QR button present
Frontend: Copiar Enlace button present and copies to clipboard
Frontend: Nueva Campaña QR button opens dialog
Frontend: New Campaign dialog has all required fields (Nombre, Canal, Fuente, Producto, Mensaje inicial, Descripción, Campaña activa)
Frontend: Nueva Intención button opens dialog
Frontend: New Intent dialog has all required fields (Nombre, Palabras clave, Canal, Fuente, Producto, Sugerencia de respuesta, Intención activa)
Frontend: Leads page shows 35 lead cards in Kanban board
Frontend: Lead cards show channel badges (emerald green) like Fibeca, WhatsApp, QR, TV, web
Frontend: Lead cards show city badges (purple), product badges (amber)
Frontend: Lead detail dialog shows Canal and Temporada fields
Frontend: Add Lead form has Canal and Temporada dropdowns
action_items: FIX (Low Priority): Intenciones Iniciales section CardHeader click does not expand/collapse content. Consider adding data-testid to card header or adding explicit button for expand/collapse

success_rate.frontend: 97% (All major features working, one minor UI bug)

seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with TEST_ created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block 2 features implemented: 1) QR Campaign CRUD with QR code generation (qrcode library + PIL), 2) Initial Intents CRUD with keywords array, 3) detect_channel_from_message() helper for auto-classification, 4) Channel badge visible on Lead cards (emerald green), 5) Channel/Season fields in Lead create/edit form. Default seed: 3 QR campaigns, 5 initial intents. QR endpoint is public (no auth). Minor issue: Intents section expand/collapse not working in UI.
block2_completion_status: COMPLETE - All core features working, one minor UI enhancement needed
